evt_009.label: Drop
evt_009.basis: Party X told BofA Merrill Lynch that it was no longer interested in pursuing a transaction, and the filing gives no more specific valuation-based comparison.
evt_009.source_text: Party X informed representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch that it was no longer interested in pursuing a potential transaction with the Company.

initiation_judgment.basis: The sale process began with a board-led decision to explore strategic alternatives before any bidder-driven approach described in the filing.
initiation_judgment.source_text: Our board of directors unanimously agreed to proceed with certain initial steps related to exploring our strategic alternatives, including a potential sale of the Company.

advisor_bofa_merrill_lynch.source_text: our board of directors unanimously approved an engagement letter with BofA Merrill Lynch providing for Merrill Lynch to act as our financial advisor in connection with reviewing our strategic alternatives.

advisor_king_spalding.source_text: representatives from King & Spalding LLP ("King & Spalding"), legal counsel to the Company, conducted introductory discussions with representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch and three other investment banks.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 50 potential buyers contacted in the 2014 sale process
count_reconciliation.note: Extraction represents 8 contacted parties in the 2014 process (New Mountain Capital, Party X, Party Y, four unnamed financial buyers, and one unnamed strategic buyer); the remaining 42 contacted parties were unnamed aggregate contacts in the filing.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 28 strategic buyers contacted in the 2014 sale process
count_reconciliation.note: Extraction represents 2 strategic parties in the 2014 process (Party Y and one unnamed strategic buyer); the remaining 26 strategic buyers were unnamed aggregate contacts in the filing.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 22 financial buyers contacted in the 2014 sale process
count_reconciliation.note: Extraction represents 6 financial parties in the 2014 process (New Mountain Capital, Party X, and four unnamed financial buyers); the remaining 16 financial buyers were unnamed aggregate contacts in the filing.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 25 potential buyers declined to enter a confidentiality agreement by March 27, 2014
count_reconciliation.note: The 25 decliners are described only in aggregate and are not individually extracted as actors or events.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 25 potential buyers executed confidentiality agreements by March 27, 2014
count_reconciliation.note: Extraction has one explicit NDA event for New Mountain Capital; the remaining confidentiality-signing parties are described only in aggregate in the filing.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 5 preliminary indications of interest received on April 14, 2014
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly when bidder_group_four_financial_buyers is expanded to four parties and bidder_group_one_strategic_buyer is expanded to one party.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 6 preliminary indications of interest received by May 9, 2014
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly when the April 14 grouped bidders are expanded to five parties and Party X's May 9 proposal is added as the sixth.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 7 preliminary indications of interest received by May 20, 2014
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly when the April 14 grouped bidders are expanded to five parties and the later Party X and Party Y proposals are added.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 6 remaining bidders after Party X withdrew
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly when the remaining grouped actors are expanded to party counts after Party X's May 14 withdrawal.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 5 remaining interested parties unable to proceed after the fire
count_reconciliation.note: The filing reports five later-stage dropouts only in aggregate, without identifying which remaining bidders they were, so extraction does not attribute those withdrawals to specific actors or drop events.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 58 parties contacted during the go-shop process
count_reconciliation.note: The go-shop outreach is reported only as an aggregate party count; the filing does not identify the 58 contacted parties individually.
